name: Lead Time Distribution
description: Lead time in days for completed work items
query:
SELECT
    v_facts.full_date AS completed_date,
    v_facts.value AS lead_time_days,
    COALESCE(v_facts.slice_value, 'all') AS issue_type
FROM metrics.v_facts
WHERE v_facts.calc_code = 'lead_time_days'
  AND v_facts.slice_rule_id IS NULL
  [[AND {{project_key}}]]
  [[AND {{completion_date}}]]
ORDER BY v_facts.full_date DESC
LIMIT 500
